description: Increased risk of bleeding when warfarin is combined with aspirin. Monitor INR closely and watch for signs of bleeding.
recommendation: Consider alternative antiplatelet therapy or reduce warfarin dose with close INR monitoring.

description: Alcohol potentiates the effect of metformin on lactate metabolism, increasing the risk of lactic acidosis.
recommendation: Advise patient to limit alcohol intake while on metformin.

description: ACE inhibitors can increase potassium levels. Combined with potassium supplements, this raises hyperkalemia risk.
Amlodipine increases simvastatin plasma levels, raising the risk of myopathy/rhabdomyolysis.
recommendation: Do not exceed simvastatin 20mg/day when co-administered with amlodipine.

description: Ciprofloxacin inhibits CYP1A2-mediated metabolism of theophylline, leading to toxic theophylline levels.
recommendation: Reduce theophylline dose by 30-50% or use alternative antibiotic.

description: Both drugs increase serotonin levels. Combination raises risk of serotonin syndrome.
recommendation: Avoid combination if possible. If used together, monitor for agitation, hyperthermia, and clonus.

description: NSAIDs reduce renal clearance of methotrexate, potentially causing methotrexate toxicity.
recommendation: Avoid concurrent use or monitor methotrexate levels closely.

description: Amiodarone increases digoxin serum concentration by reducing its renal and non-renal clearance.
recommendation: Reduce digoxin dose by 50% when initiating amiodarone. Monitor digoxin levels.

description: Omeprazole inhibits CYP2C19, reducing conversion of clopidogrel to its active metabolite.
recommendation: Use pantoprazole as an alternative PPI if acid suppression is needed.

description: Thiazide diuretics reduce lithium excretion, increasing the risk of lithium toxicity.
recommendation: Monitor lithium levels closely. Consider reducing lithium dose or using a loop diuretic instead.
